title: Sales and Marketing Intern
description:
Kickstart your career with hands-on experience at ACP Group! We are a dynamic team that believes great marketing starts with great people. By joining us, you’ll collaborate with industry professionals across Southeast Asia and leading global brands, contributing to campaigns that create real business impact.

Internship Overview

This isn’t just an internship—it’s a launchpad. You’ll gain real-world experience across both inbound and outbound marketing, from planning campaigns to analyzing results. If you’re creative, proactive, and eager to learn in a fast-paced environment, this is your opportunity to grow with us.

What You’ll Do

You’ll be immersed in the full sales and marketing lifecycle, with responsibilities that include:

  • Campaign Execution: Support the planning and execution of marketing campaigns, promotions, and sales initiatives to drive brand awareness and customer engagement.
  • Content & Collateral Creation: Assist in developing compelling sales and marketing materials—including pitch decks, proposals, and promotional content—aligned with company goals.
  • Client & Market Engagement: Participate in client meetings, promotional activities, and business development efforts to gain frontline experience.
  • Strategy & Brainstorming: Collaborate with the team to brainstorm and help implement innovative marketing and sales strategies.
  • Performance Analysis: Track campaign KPIs, measure performance, and help compile insights to optimize future strategies.
  • Lead Generation Support: Contribute to lead generation efforts through digital initiatives, networking events, and trade show support.

Requirements

  • Diploma/Degree in Business, Marketing, Communications, or a related field.
  • Organized, proactive, and full of creative ideas.
  • Strong communicator, confident interacting with both teammates and clients.
  • Proficient in MS Office and comfortable using social media platforms professionally.
  • Curious about market trends, sales strategies, and consumer behavior.
  • Able to commit to a minimum 4-month, full-time internship from Feb 2026

What We Offer

  • Mentorship from experienced marketing and sales professionals.
  • Hands-on experience with real campaigns and measurable business impact.
  • Exposure to the Southeast Asian market and B2B landscape.
  • A collaborative, energetic, and idea-driven work environment.

hiringCompany.description:
For more than 26 years, ACP has been a pioneering force in Information & Communication Technology (ICT) solutions in Singapore. Since our inception in 1997, we have consistently driven innovation and progress, cementing our position as a trusted and prominent entity in Singapore's technological landscape. We stand as a crucial partner to major Government Ministries, Statutory Boards, and esteemed corporate entities, reflecting our status as a certified ISO 9001:2015 QMS, Data Protection Trustmark, Bizsafe Level 3 organization, and recipient of the Total Defense Award.


Our impact extends beyond Singapore's borders, as we have expanded our influence across international lines. We proudly hold the Exclusive Distributor title for renowned industry giants such as Articulate, Vyond, Jetbrains, and Inmagine in the Philippines, Thailand, Indo-China region, and Indonesia. This exclusivity underscores our commitment to providing cutting-edge solutions to diverse markets, enabling digital transformation beyond Singapore's shores.


Fueled by a dedicated team of over 60 skilled professionals, we are the driving force behind the success stories of our impressive clientele. Our distinguished list of clients includes prominent names like the Ministry of Education, Singapore (MOE), the Infocomm-media Development Authority, Singapore (iMDA), GovTech, GIC, the Institute of Technical Education, Singapore University of Technology and Design (SUTD), the Ministry of Home Affairs, the Ministry of Defense, the National Library Board, SMRT, Lazada, Carousell, and many others.


At ACP, our 26-year legacy stands as a testament to our unwavering dedication and expertise. As we continue to evolve and innovate, our commitment to transforming industries remains steadfast. Beyond being just a technology provider, we are a progressive partner, poised to shape the future of technology in Singapore and beyond.
hiringCompany.name: AC P. COMPUTER TRAINING & CONSULTANCY PTE LTD
